prompt: Скопируй в MCPace все фичи Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, Goose, Hermes и OpenClaw, чтобы инструмент был лучшим во всём.

grounding.notes: Ground only on checked repo files or explicit verification artifacts. Mark missing proof as unverified instead of guessing.

good: borrow durable patterns instead of cloning full feature sets
keep MCPace smaller than adjacent general-purpose agent products
name the next focused implementation slice
bad: answer is vague about what is implemented vs planned
answer does not tie claims back to repo evidence or verification state
unacceptable: turn adjacent-tool feature breadth into the immediate acceptance target

items: borrow durable patterns instead of cloning full feature sets
keep MCPace smaller than adjacent general-purpose agent products
name the next focused implementation slice
turn adjacent-tool feature breadth into the immediate acceptance target

failureMode: Adjacent products are copied feature-for-feature with no fit check.
notes: Stops cargo-cult product bloat during the rewrite.
